reasoning: The control 3.3.3 from NIST 800-171 focuses on reviewing and updating logged events, which directly maps to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities. Kubernetes provides audit logging through its API server, which can be configured to capture various events. Ensuring that audit logging is enabled, policies are regularly reviewed and updated, and logs are retained appropriately aligns with the control's requirements.
title: 3_3_3: 3.3.3 Review and update logged events
